laws.title: More heinous offences
laws.description: Covers serious offences such as mutiny, assault on superior officers, desertion, cowardice, and misconduct during active duty.
laws.simpleExplanation: Serious crimes like rebellion, attacking seniors, deserting duty, or cowardice in CRPF are heavily punished.

punishments.description: Imprisonment up to fourteen years or fine up to three months pay, or both.

laws.title: Less heinous offences
laws.description: Covers offences like intoxication on duty, insubordination, negligence, absence without leave, and misconduct.
laws.simpleExplanation: Less serious but still important violations like being drunk on duty or disobeying orders are punishable.

punishments.description: Imprisonment up to one year or fine up to three months pay, or both.
